units.name: Hive Tyrant
units.abilities: The Will of the Hive Mind: At the start of the Generate Command Assets step, if this unit is a Warlord and is on the battlefield, you generate one extra Command Asset.

options.text: A Hive Tyrant is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Heavy Venom Cannon; Monstrous Scything Talons; Prehensile Pincer Tail.
Instead of 1 Monstrous Scything Talons, this unit can be equipped with one of the following: Deathspitters with Slimer Maggots; Devourers with Brainleech Worms; Monstrous Bio-weapons.

Instead of 1 Heavy Venom Cannon, this unit can be equipped with one of the following: Deathspitters with Slimer Maggots; Devourers with Brainleech Worms; Monstrous Bio-weapons; Monstrous Scything Talons; Stranglethorn Cannon.
This unit can have Wings (Power Rating +2)
- Has a Move characteristic of 16".
- Has the following additional abilities: Deep Strike.
- Has the following additional keywords: Fly.

units.name: Tyranid Prime
units.abilities: Alpha Warrior: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by <Hive Fleet> Tyranid Warrior units whilst they are within 6" of any friendly units with this ability.

options.text: A Tyranid Prime is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Ranged Bio-weapons; Melee Bio-weapons.

units.name: Broodlord
units.abilities: Brood Telepathy: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made with melee weapons by <Hive Fleet> Genestealer units whilst they are within 6" of any friendly <Hive Fleet> units with this ability.

options.text: A Broodlord is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Monstrous Rending Claws.

units.name: The Swarmlord
units.abilities:
The Will of the Hive Mind: At the start of the Generate Command Assets step, if this unit is a Warlord and is on the battlefield, you generate one extra Command Asset.
Hive Commander: Morale tests taken for friendly <Hive Fleet> units are automatically passed whilst they are within 18" of this unit.

options.text: The Swarmlord is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Bone Sabres; Prehensile Pincer Tail. You can only include one of this unit in your army.

units.name: Termagants
units.abilities: Hail of Living Ammunition: If this unit contains 30 models, re-roll wound rolls of 1 for attacks made with ranged weapons by this unit.

options.text: It can contain 20 models (Power Rating 4)
30 models (Power Rating 7)
Instead of Fleshborers, this unit can be equipped with Spinefists (Power Rating +1 for each 10 models this unit contains).
Instead of Fleshborers, this unit can be equipped with Devourers (Power Rating +2 for each 10 models this unit contains).

units.name: Hormagaunts
units.abilities: Hungering Swarm: If this unit contains 30 models, re-roll wound rolls of 1 for attacks made with melee weapons by this unit.

options.text: It can contain 20 models (Power Rating 4)
30 models (Power Rating 7)

units.name: Ripper Swarms
units.abilities: Deep Strike

options.text: It can contain 6 models (Power Rating 4)
9 models (Power Rating 6)
It can contain 6 models (Power Rating 8)
9 models (Power Rating 12)
For every 3 models this unit contains, it can also be equipped with one of the following (Power Rating +1 per weapon): 1 Barbed Strangler; 1 Venom Cannon.

units.name: Genestealers
units.abilities: Infiltrators

options.text: It can contain 10 models (Power Rating 9), 15 models (Power Rating 13)
It can contain 10 models (Power Rating 9), 15 models (Power Rating 13)
20 models (Power Rating 17)

units.name: Zoanthropes
units.abilities: Warp Field: Roll D12s when making saving throws for this unit, irrespective of the size of the blast markers next to it.

options.text: It can contain 6 models (Power Rating 10)

units.name: Lictor
units.abilities: Deep Strike, Stealth

options.text: A Lictor is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Flesh Hooks; Grasping Talons.

units.name: Deathleaper
units.abilities: Deep Strike, Stealth, Terror Troops

options.text: Deathleaper is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Flesh Hooks; Grasping Talons. You can only include one of this unit in your army.

units.name: Tyrant Guard
units.abilities: Shieldwall: At the start of the Damage phase, you can select one friendly <Hive Fleet> Hive Tyrant unit that has at least one blast marker next to it and is within 6" of this unit. Remove up to D3 blast markers from that Hive Tyrant unit and place them next to this unit.

options.text: It can contain 6 models (Power Rating 10)
It can contain 6 models (Power Rating 10)
Instead of Impaler Cannons, this unit can be equipped with Shockcannons.

units.name: Venomthropes
units.abilities:
Shrouding Spores: Friendly Light <Hive Fleet> and Heavy <Hive Fleet> units have the Stealth ability whilst they are within 6" of this unit. If this unit contains 6 models, the range of this ability is increased by 3".
Toxic Miasma: At the end of the Action phase, roll one D6 for each unit within 6" of any enemy units with this ability; on a 6 place one blast marker next to the unit being rolled for.

options.text: It can contain 6 models (Power Rating 8)

units.name: Neurothrope
units.abilities: Warp Field: Roll D12s when making saving throws for this unit, irrespective of the size of the blast markers next to it.

options.text: A Neurothrope is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Spirit Leech; Claws & Teeth.

units.name: Gargoyles
units.abilities:
Deep Strike
Hail of Living Ammunition: If this unit contains 30 models, re-roll wound rolls of 1 for attacks made with ranged weapons by this unit.

options.text: It can contain 20 models (Power Rating 8)
30 models (Power Rating 12)

units.name: Raveners
units.abilities: Deep Strike

options.text: It can contain 6 models (Power Rating 10)
9 models (Power Rating 15)

units.name: The Red Terror
units.abilities:
Deep Strike
Feeding Frenzy: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made with melee weapons by friendly <Hive Fleet> Ravener units whilst they are within 6" of this unit.

options.text: The Red Terror is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Prehensile Pincer Tail; Scything Talons. You can only include one of this unit in your army.

units.name: Spore Mines
units.abilities:
Deep Strike
Living Bombs: Morale tests taken for this unit are automatically passed.
Floating Death: After a Move action (made by any unit), if this unit is within 3" of an enemy unit, roll one D6 for each model in this unit. For each 3+ place one blast marker next to the closest enemy unit. Then, this unit is destroyed.

options.text: It can contain 6 models (Power Rating 4)
9 models (Power Rating 6).

units.name: Carnifex
units.abilities:
Chitin Thorns: At the end of the Action phase, roll a D6 for each unit within 6" of any enemy units with Chitin Thorns; on a 6 place one blast marker next to the unit being rolled for.
Monstrous Brood: Each Heavy Support slot in a Detachment allows you to take up to three of this unit in your army, instead of one. Each unit taken for a single Heavy Support slot must be placed at the same time and within 6" of each other unit taken for the same slot the first time they are set up.

options.text: A Carnifex is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Heavy Venom Cannon; Carnifex Jaws; Carnifex Melee Weapons.
Instead of Carnifex Melee Weapons, this unit can be equipped with one of the following: Deathspitters with Slimer Maggots; Devourers with Brainleech Worms.
Instead of 1 Heavy Venom Cannon, this unit can be equipped with one of the following: Carnifex Melee Weapons; Deathspitters with Slimer Maggots; Devourers with Brainleech Worms; Stranglethorn Cannon.
This unit can also be equipped with Spine Banks (Power Rating +1).
This unit can have Enhanced Senses (Power Rating +1)
This unit can have Chitin Thorns (Power Rating +1)

units.name: Exocrine
units.abilities: Weapon Beast: When this unit makes a Shoot action, if it has remained stationary this turn, double the Attacks characteristic of its Bio-plasmic Cannon for that action.

options.text: An Exocrine is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Bio-plasmic Cannon; Powerful Limbs.

units.name: Tyrannofex
units.abilities: Weapon Beast: When this unit makes a Shoot action, if it has remained stationary this turn, double the Attacks characteristic of its Acid Spray, Fleshborer Hive, Rupture Cannon and Stinger Salvo for that action.

options.text: A Tyrannofex is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Acid Spray; Stinger Salvo; Powerful Limbs.
Instead of 1 Acid Spray, this unit can be equipped with one of the following: 1 Fleshborer Hive; 1 Rupture Cannon.
It can contain 2 models (Power Rating 4)
3 models (Power Rating 6)

units.name: Toxicrene
units.abilities:
Hypertoxic Miasma: At the end of the Action phase, roll one D6 for each unit within 6" of any enemy units with this ability; on a 5+ place one blast marker next to the unit being rolled for.
Acid Blood: When a blast marker is placed next to this unit, if it is in base contact with any enemy units, select one of those units and roll one D6. On a 4+ place one blast marker next to that unit.

options.text: A Toxicrene is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Choking Spores; Massive Toxic Lashes (Ranged); Massive Toxic Lashes (Melee).

units.name: Screamer-Killer
units.abilities:
Terror Troops
Monstrous Brood: Each Heavy Support slot in a Detachment allows you to take up to three of this unit in your army, instead of one. Each unit taken for a single Heavy Support slot must be placed at the same time and within 6" of each other unit taken for the same slot the first time they are set up.

options.text: A Screamer-Killer is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Bio-plasmic Scream; Screamer-Killer Talons.

units.name: Trygon
units.abilities: Deep Strike

options.text: A Trygon is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Bio-electric Pulse; Massive Scything Talons.

units.name: Old One Eye
units.abilities:
Alpha Leader: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made with melee weapons by friendly <Hive Fleet> Carnifex units whilst they are within 6" of this unit.
Regeneration: At the start of the Action phase, you can remove one damage marker from this unit.

options.text: Old One Eye is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Monstrous Crushing Claws; Monstrous Scything Talons. You can only include one of this unit in your army.

units.name: Tyrannocyte
units.abilities:
Deep Strike
Transport Spore: When this unit is set up in Tactical Reserves, you can also set up a friendly <Hive Fleet> Infantry unit of up to 20 models or a <Hive Fleet> Monster unit with a Wounds characteristic of 4 or less inside it (this cannot be a Tyrannocyte or Sporocyst). When this unit uses its Deep Strike ability, set any unit inside it up on the battlefield wholly within 6" of this unit and more than 9" from enemy units. If that unit cannot be placed in this way, it is destroyed.

options.text: A Tyrannocyte is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Deathspitters; Barbed Tentacles.
Instead of Deathspitters, this unit can be equipped with one of the following: Barbed Stranglers; Venom Cannons.

units.name: Harpy
units.abilities: Spore Mine Cysts: After this unit makes a Move action, you can select one enemy unit it moved over whilst making that Move action. Roll one D6; on a 3+ place one blast marker next to that unit.

options.text: A Harpy is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Stinger Salvo; Stranglethorn Cannons; Scything Wings.
Instead of Stranglethorn Cannons, this unit can be equipped with Heavy Venom Cannons.
A Hive Crone is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Drool Cannon; Stinger Salvo; Tentaclids; Scything Wings; Wicked Spur.

units.name: Sporocyst
units.abilities:
Deep Strike
Immobile: This unit is never Out of Command: an Out of Command marker is never placed next to it.
Bio-fortress: When this unit makes a Shoot action, it can target enemy units in base contact with it.

options.text: A Sporocyst is a unit that contains 1 model. It is equipped with: Deathspitters; Spore Node; Barbed Tentacles.
Instead of Deathspitters, this unit can be equipped with one of the following: Barbed Stranglers; Venom Cannons.
